import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut found = false
  mut split_at = 0
  while i < n
    let b = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match b
    when Some(c)
      if not found
        if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
          split_at = i
          found = true
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not found
    Err("no whitespace")
  else
    let a_str = string.substring(input, 0, split_at)
    mut j = split_at
    while j < n
      let b = string.byte_at(input, j)
      match b
      when Some(c)
        if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
          j = j + 1
        else
          j = n + 1000000
        end
      when None
        j = j + 1
      end
    end
    let b_start = j - 1000000
    mut k = b_start
    mut b_end = n
    mut done = false
    while k < n
      let bb = string.byte_at(input, k)
      match bb
      when Some(c)
        if not done
          if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
            b_end = k
            done = true
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    let b_str = string.substring(input, b_start, b_end)
    let a_opt = string.parse_int(string.trim(a_str))
    let b_opt = string.parse_int(string.trim(b_str))
    match a_opt
    when Some(a)
      match b_opt
      when Some(bv)
        let r = a * a + bv * bv
        print("r=#{r}")
        Ok(())
      when None
        Err("bad b")
      end
    when None
      Err("bad a")
    end
  end
end
